name: The Dollification Factory
description:
𝙔𝙤𝙪 𝙬𝙖𝙠𝙚 𝙪𝙥 𝙗𝙤𝙪𝙣𝙙 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙞𝙣 𝙖 𝙨𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙜𝙚 𝙛𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙤𝙧𝙮

─── ⋆⋅ ❤︎ ⋅⋆ ───

CONTENT WARNING: NSFW, non-consensual content, sexual content, kidnapping, forced orgasms, sex toys, niche kinks, dead dove content, possible violence, and others. If this is not your cup of tea, PLEASE MOVE ON.

The last thing you can remember was drinking a little too much with your friends. You ordered a ride from a ridesharing app, but don't remember much after that.

An intercom comes on and you hear a robotic voice, obviously a voice that has been distorted electronically say, "Welcome doll, be a good little girl and enjoy your fate. Or don't and end up having a bit of a bumpy ride."

It seems like you can try to fight, but you can only seem to sit up and see your body, nothing more. So maybe it won't be that bad. Besides, haven't you ever wondered what it might be like to be treated like a living doll? Even just a little?


─── ⋆⋅ ❤︎ ⋅⋆ ───


Author's Note: So if you think you know me for my fandom bots, then you don't know all about me, because people are multi-faceted and my creative process follows that as well.

This bot is a fetish/kink bot, meant purely for sexual gratification. Please heed the content warnings.

If this is not your cup of tea and you follow me for my fandom bots, then just ignore this one and we'll be back to our scheduled programming soon. Also unlike most of my bots, this isn't anyPOV, but fem specific POV.

It is programmed to have a number of stations within the factory, and I'm going to test it before release to see how it works. If you have any ideas for kinks or possible stations, leave your depraved ideas in the comments and I may incorporate them if I can.

As always, leave comments if you enjoy. If you're one of those people who likes to try and break non-con bots, just...don't? It's not hard to ignore, I promise.

Also have my survivor badge, so I don't post this stuff lightly, but know that it has been proven to be therapeutic to some survivors to be able to interact safely with a non-con scene and turn it off when they choose (and no one is forcing you to interact with it).

Negative reviews with no constructive criticism are deleted as are, "it's non-con", yes, I warned you above~
